description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update and apt-get install -y python-pip. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit-tests job that runs apt-get install -y git, configures git user.name "Test User" and user.email "testuser@gmail.com", and executes python -m unittest discover -v. In the deploy stage add a pages job that installs mkdocs via pip, runs PYTHONPATH=. python gitutils/git_utils.py -m > www/mkdocs_docs/commands.md, changes directory to www and runs mkdocs build --clean, returns to the root, captures the version with VERSION=$(PYTHONPATH=. python gitutils/git_utils.py -v) and writes it to public/version.json, creates a public/release directory, builds a source distribution with python setup.py sdist, copies the resulting gitutils*.tar.gz and update.py into public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The pages job should only run for tag pipelines or trigger pipelines.
